title: Essence Collection
description: The Arcane Circle needs fresh magical reagents for upcoming enchantments. Venture into the wilderness near Elder Moor and gather rare herbs, crystals, and essence from magical creatures. This is your final test as a Novice - succeed and you'll be promoted to Apprentice.

objectives.description: Gather moonpetal flowers from Elder Moor forest
objectives.notes: Rare flowers found in Elder Moor wilderness

objectives.description: Collect mana crystals from the Crossroads area
Harvest spirit essence from undead creatures
objectives.notes: Dropped by undead enemies in the wilderness

objectives.description: Return the reagents to Archmage Elara

notes: Final Novice quest. Promotion to Apprentice rank. Rewards magical staff. Requires wilderness exploration and combat.
